description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows (Qt 6, x64) that can be triggered manually. Run a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, installs Qt 6.2.2 for Windows 64-bit with MinGW, configures a CMake build with Release type and Qt 6, builds the project, runs tests, packages the build with windeployqt, and uploads the resulting package as a GitHub Actions artifact.
